headings.text: Join 1,400 teams already on the waitlist
Which tools do you integrate with?
Can I bring my team along?

paragraphs.text: Be first to ship release notes, changelogs, and customer emails in seconds. Onboarding rolls out weekly — invites are sent in batches by company size.
We onboard new teams every Tuesday. Most invitations are sent within 7–14 days of signing up.
We're SOC 2 Type II audited, encrypt all data at rest with AES-256, and never train on your content.
Notion, Jira, Linear, Confluence, GitHub, Slack, and HubSpot — with Asana and Intercom coming next.
Yes. Early access seats are granted at the workspace level — invite teammates from any plan once approved.
The AI writing copilot that turns messy Notion docs and Jira tickets into polished release notes in seconds.

styles.backgroundImage: linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%, rgb(182, 186, 202) 50%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(182, 186, 202) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%)

items.text:
When will I get access?
          We onboard new teams every Tuesday. Most invitations are sent within 7–14 days of signing up.

Is my data secure?
          We're SOC 2 Type II audited, encrypt all data at rest with AES-256, and never train on your content.

Which tools do you integrate with?
          Notion, Jira, Linear, Confluence, GitHub, Slack, and HubSpot — with Asana and Intercom coming next.

Can I bring my team along?
          Yes. Early access seats are granted at the workspace level — invite teammates from any plan once approved.

Luminos
        
        The AI writing copilot that turns messy Notion docs and Jira tickets into polished release notes in seconds.
